concerns.text: FR-020 states 'System MUST compute all reported statistics…from the dataset'. However, the description of US-1 Acceptance Scenario 3 explicitly allows the pipeline to halt and report an error message (`[DATA_UNAVAILABLE...]`) if data is missing. This is a computed result (the error message itself), but it's triggered by a data *absence*, which is a violation of the 'no hardcoded values' principle. The pipeline is effectively 'hardcoding' the error message based on a data condition. This is a direct contradiction.
